title: Ping Me!
description: Adds Discord-like notifications to the game.
body:
# PING ME!

**Ping Me!** adds Discord-like notifications to the game.

### How to ping a player
To ping a player, all you have to do is type `@` in chat and then the player's username, just like you would in Discord.

There is also `@everyone` that will ping everyone with a built-in cooldown if the player starts to spam it.

### What does the ping do?
When you ping a player, they will receive a sound notification (Just like Discord, weird right?) and the mention in chat will result yellow to make them know they've been pinged.
